info.title: Sendspark API
info.description: Public Sendspark API. DRAFT scaffold generated from the internal API v2 spec — endpoint selection and authentication are pending engineering review before publishing.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields to include in the response (emailEmbedHTML, fields)
parameters.name: include

post.summary: Create Dynamics Campaign for the DV by steps UI
post.description: Create Dynamics Campaign in folder for the DV by steps UI
Schedules bundle cancellation at the end of the current billing period. Bundle continues to contribute minutes until then. No refund.

post.summary: Generate videos for Dynamics Campaign prospect list
post.description: Generate videos for Dynamics Campaign prospect list

post.summary: Generate videos for Dynamics Campaign prospect list
post.description: Generate videos for Dynamics Campaign prospect list

post.summary: Add prospect to Dynamics Campaign and process video.
Bulk add and process prospects to a dynamics campaign.

patch.summary: Add minutes to an existing custom DVM bundle
patch.description: Increases the minute quantity of an active custom DVM bundle by addMinutes. The new total is validated against plan max/step. Stripe prorates the additional cost for the remaining billing period and invoices it immediately.

patch.summary: Bulk update prospect background URLs based on email domains.
patch.description: This endpoint is used to bulk update prospect background URLs based on email domains.

message.example: Resource not found or invalid access
Invalid request payload input / Any error from provider

validationField.example: Show field with errors, Example: contactEmail

validationMessage.example: Show error detail related with field with error, example: Invalid email

validationCode.example: Show error code related with field with error, example: 400

Model101.description: Additional fields associated with the prospect

status.example: Current prospect status, Example: saved, billed, errored, processing, uploaded, completed

deletedAt.example: Deleted Date if prospect was deleted, Example: 2020-01-01T00:00:00.000Z

valid.example: False if prospect has validation errors

shareUrl.example: Public URL to share the final video, example: https://sendspark.com/share/997f191e81

contactEmail.description: Must be unique for each dynamics videos campaign
Must be unique for each dynamics videos campaign

extractUrlFromEmail.description: If true, sets backgroundUrl based on email domain. If false, removes backgroundUrls matching email domain.
